title: Gutenbergia fruticosa
intro: Gutenbergia fruticosa is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Gutenbergia fruticosa include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Gutenbergia fruticosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
